---
title: "Resources & Reading List"
subtitle: "Curated entry points into the LLM agents literature"
---

## Getting Started

If you're new to LLM agents, start with these:

1. **[Lilian Weng — LLM Powered Autonomous Agents](https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/)** (June 2023)  
   The most widely cited blog post introduction to the field. Covers planning, memory, tool use with great diagrams.

2. **[Agentic Large Language Models: A Survey](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.23037)** (Plaat et al., JAIR 2025)  
   Peer-reviewed survey organizing the field around **Reason–Act–Interact**. Introduces the virtuous cycle framing, covers theory of mind and emergent social behavior, and provides a research agenda. Also at [alphaxiv](https://www.alphaxiv.org/abs/2503.23037) with annotations. Companion site: [askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site](https://askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site/)

3. **[ReAct paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629)** (Yao et al., 2022)  
   The canonical agent loop: Reason + Act interleaved. Essential reading.

4. **[A Survey on Large Language Model based Autonomous Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.11432)** (Wang et al., 2023)  
   Comprehensive academic survey covering construction, application, and evaluation.

---

## Key Survey Papers

| Title | Authors | Year | Link |
|-------|---------|------|------|
| A Survey on Large Language Model based Autonomous Agents | Wang et al. | 2023 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.11432) |
| The Rise and Potential of Large Language Model Based Agents | Xi et al. | 2023 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.07864) |
| **Agentic Large Language Models, a survey** *(JAIR 2025)* | Plaat et al. (Leiden) | 2025 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.23037) · [site](https://askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site/) |
| Agent AI: Surveying the Horizons of Multimodal Interaction | Wang et al. | 2024 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.03568) |
| Large Language Models as Tool Makers | Cai et al. | 2023 | [arXiv](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.17126) |

---

## Essential Papers by Category

### Foundations
- **ReAct** — [arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629)
- **Toolformer** — [arxiv.org/abs/2302.04761](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.04761)
- **Chain-of-Thought Prompting** — [arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903](https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903)
- **MRKL Systems** — [arxiv.org/abs/2205.00445](https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.00445)
- **WebGPT** — [arxiv.org/abs/2112.09332](https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.09332)

### Reasoning & Planning
- **Tree of Thoughts** — [arxiv.org/abs/2305.10601](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.10601)
- **Reflexion** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366)
- **Self-Refine** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.17651](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17651)

### Multi-Agent
- **CAMEL** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.17760](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17760)
- **MetaGPT** — [arxiv.org/abs/2308.00352](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.00352)
- **AutoGen** — [arxiv.org/abs/2308.08155](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.08155)
- **Generative Agents** — [arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442)
- **ChatDev** — [arxiv.org/abs/2307.07924](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.07924)

### Memory
- **MemGPT** — [arxiv.org/abs/2310.08560](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.08560)

### Tools & Actions
- **HuggingGPT / JARVIS** — [arxiv.org/abs/2303.17580](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17580)
- **Gorilla LLM** — [arxiv.org/abs/2305.15334](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15334)
- **ToolLLM** — [arxiv.org/abs/2307.16789](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.16789)

### Coding Agents
- **SWE-agent** — [arxiv.org/abs/2405.15793](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15793)
- **CodeAct** — [arxiv.org/abs/2402.01030](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.01030)
- **SWE-bench** — [arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770)

---

## Key Frameworks (GitHub)

| Framework | GitHub | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| LangChain | [github.com/langchain-ai/langchain](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langchain) | Full-stack agent framework |
| LangGraph | [github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph) | Graph-based agent workflows |
| AutoGen | [github.com/microsoft/autogen](https://github.com/microsoft/autogen) | Multi-agent conversation |
| CrewAI | [github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI](https://github.com/crewAIInc/crewAI) | Role-based agent crews |
| SWE-agent | [github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent](https://github.com/princeton-nlp/SWE-agent) | GitHub issue resolution |
| OpenDevin | [github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands](https://github.com/All-Hands-AI/OpenHands) | Open software dev agent |
| DSPy | [github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy](https://github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy) | Programming language models |
| MemGPT | [github.com/cpacker/MemGPT](https://github.com/cpacker/MemGPT) | Agents with long-term memory |

---

## Influential Blog Posts

### Introductions & Overviews

| Title | Author | Date |
|-------|--------|------|
| [LLM Powered Autonomous Agents](https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/) | Lilian Weng | Jun 2023 |
| [Emerging Architectures for LLM Applications](https://a16z.com/emerging-architectures-for-llm-applications/) | a16z | Jun 2023 |
| [A Hitchhiker's Guide to Building AI Agents](https://saurabhalone.com/blog/agent) | Saurabh Alone | 2025 |
| [Making Sense of Memory in AI Agents](https://www.leoniemonigatti.com/blog/memory-in-ai-agents.html) | Leonie Monigatti | 2025 |

### Production & Practitioner Guides

| Title | Author | Date |
|-------|--------|------|
| [Building effective agents](https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents) | Anthropic (Schluntz & Zhang) | Dec 2024 |
| [How we built our multi-agent research system](https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/multi-agent-research-system) | Anthropic Engineering | 2025 |
| [What We Learned from a Year of Building with LLMs](https://applied-llms.org) | Eugene Yan et al. | 2024 |
| [Agents 101: The Art of Actually Getting Things Done](https://devin.ai/agents101) | Cognition AI (Devin) | 2025 |
| [Building Your Own Coding Agent](https://martinfowler.com/articles/build-own-coding-agent.html) | Martin Fowler | 2025 |
| [AI in Production: What Actually Works in 2026](https://47billion.com/blog/ai-agents-in-production-frameworks-protocols-and-what-actually-works-in-2026/) | 47 Billion | 2026 |
| [Google Cloud: Lessons from 2025 on Agents and Trust](https://cloud.google.com/transform/ai-grew-up-and-got-a-job-lessons-from-2025-on-agents-and-trust) | Google Cloud CTO Office | Dec 2025 |

### Builder Diaries & Case Studies

| Title | Author | Date |
|-------|--------|------|
| [Strix: Meet the Stateful Agent](https://timkellogg.me/blog/2025/12/15/strix) | Tim Kellogg | Dec 2025 |
| [Memory Architecture for a Synthetic Being](https://timkellogg.me/blog/2025/12/30/memory-arch) | Tim Kellogg | Dec 2025 |
| [Viable Systems: How to Build a Fully Autonomous Agent](https://timkellogg.me/blog/2026/01/09/viable-systems) | Tim Kellogg | Jan 2026 |
| [One Human + One Agent + One Browser](https://emsh.cat/one-human-one-agent-one-browser/) | emsh.cat | 2026 |
| [OpenAI Harness Engineering](https://openai.com/index/harness-engineering/) | OpenAI | 2025 |

---

## Benchmarks & Evaluation

| Benchmark | Focus | Link |
|-----------|-------|------|
| SWE-bench | Software engineering tasks | [swebench.com](https://www.swebench.com) |
| WebArena | Web navigation | [arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854) |
| AgentBench | Multi-domain agent eval | [arxiv.org/abs/2308.03688](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.03688) |
| GAIA | General AI assistant tasks | [arxiv.org/abs/2311.12983](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.12983) |
| OSWorld | Desktop GUI tasks | [arxiv.org/abs/2404.07972](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.07972) |

---

## Courses & Tutorials

- **[DeepLearning.AI — AI Agents in LangGraph](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agents-in-langgraph/)** — Harrison Chase + Andrew Ng
- **[DeepLearning.AI — Multi AI Agent Systems with crewAI](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/multi-ai-agent-systems-with-crewai/)** — João Moura
- **[DeepLearning.AI — AI Agentic Design Patterns with AutoGen](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agentic-design-patterns-with-autogen/)** — Chi Wang + Qingyun Wu
- **[Hugging Face — Agents Course](https://huggingface.co/learn/agents-course)** — Free, hands-on

---

## References

### Survey Papers
- **Agentic Large Language Models: A Survey** (Plaat et al., 2025) — [arXiv:2503.23037](https://arxiv.org/abs/2503.23037) / [Site](https://askeplaat.github.io/agentic-llm-survey-site/)
- **A Survey on Large Language Model based Autonomous Agents** (Wang et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2308.11432](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.11432)
- **The Rise and Potential of Large Language Model Based Agents** (Xi et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2309.07864](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.07864)
- **Agent AI: Surveying the Horizons of Multimodal Interaction** (Wang et al., 2024) — [arXiv:2401.03568](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.03568)
- **Large Language Models as Tool Makers** (Cai et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2305.17126](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.17126)

### Foundation Papers
- **ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models** (Yao et al., 2022) — [arXiv:2210.03629](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.03629)
- **Toolformer: Language Models Can Teach Themselves to Use Tools** (Schick et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2302.04761](https://arxiv.org/abs/2302.04761)
- **Chain-of-Thought Prompting Elicits Reasoning in Large Language Models** (Wei et al., 2022) — [arXiv:2201.11903](https://arxiv.org/abs/2201.11903)
- **MRKL Systems: A modular, neuro-symbolic architecture that combines large language models, external knowledge sources and discrete reasoning** (Karpukhin et al., 2022) — [arXiv:2205.00445](https://arxiv.org/abs/2205.00445)
- **WebGPT: Browser-assisted Question-Answering with Large Language Models** (Nakano et al., 2021) — [arXiv:2112.09332](https://arxiv.org/abs/2112.09332)

### Reasoning & Planning Papers
- **Tree of Thoughts: Deliberate Problem Solving with Large Language Models** (Yao et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2305.10601](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.10601)
- **Reflexion: Language Agents with Verbal Reinforcement Learning** (Shinn et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2303.11366](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.11366)
- **Self-Refine: Iterative Refinement with Self-Feedback** (Madaan et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2303.17651](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17651)

### Multi-Agent Papers
- **CAMEL: Communicative Agents for "Mind" Exploration of Large Scale Language Model Society** (Li et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2303.17760](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17760)
- **MetaGPT: The Multi-Agent Framework** (Hong et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2308.00352](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.00352)
- **AutoGen: Enabling Next-Gen LLM Applications via Multi-Agent Conversation Framework** (Wu et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2308.08155](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.08155)
- **Generative Agents: Interactive Simulacra of Human Behavior** (Park et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2304.03442](https://arxiv.org/abs/2304.03442)
- **ChatDev: Communicative Agents for Software Development** (Qian et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2307.07924](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.07924)

### Memory Papers
- **MemGPT: Towards LLMs as Operating Systems** (Packer et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2310.08560](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.08560)

### Tools & Actions Papers
- **HuggingGPT: Solving AI Tasks with Chatbot** (Sap et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2303.17580](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17580)
- **Gorilla: Large Language Model Connected with Massive APIs** (Patil et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2305.15334](https://arxiv.org/abs/2305.15334)
- **ToolLLM: Facilitating Large Language Models to Master 16000+ Real-world APIs** (Qin et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2307.16789](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.16789)

### Coding Agent Papers
- **SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering** (Yang et al., 2024) — [arXiv:2405.15793](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15793)
- **CodeAct: Executable Code Actions for Agentic Language Models** (Wang et al., 2024) — [arXiv:2402.01030](https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.01030)
- **SWE-bench: Can Language Models Resolve Real-World GitHub Issues?** (Jimenez et al., 2023) — [arXiv:2310.06770](https://arxiv.org/abs/2310.06770)

### Blog Posts & Articles
- **LLM Powered Autonomous Agents** — Lilian Weng (Jun 2023) — [lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/](https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2023-06-23-agent/)
- **Emerging Architectures for LLM Applications** — a16z (Jun 2023) — [a16z.com/emerging-architectures-for-llm-applications/](https://a16z.com/emerging-architectures-for-llm-applications/)
- **Building effective agents** — Anthropic (Schluntz & Zhang, Dec 2024) — [anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents](https://www.anthropic.com/research/building-effective-agents)
- **How we built our multi-agent research system** — Anthropic Engineering (2025) — [anthropic.com/engineering/multi-agent-research-system](https://www.anthropic.com/engineering/multi-agent-research-system)
- **What We Learned from a Year of Building with LLMs** — Eugene Yan et al. (2024) — [applied-llms.org](https://applied-llms.org)
- **Agents 101: The Art of Actually Getting Things Done** — Cognition AI/Devin (2025) — [devin.ai/agents101](https://devin.ai/agents101)
- **Building Your Own Coding Agent** — Martin Fowler (2025) — [martinfowler.com/articles/build-own-coding-agent.html](https://martinfowler.com/articles/build-own-coding-agent.html)
- **AI in Production: What Actually Works in 2026** — 47 Billion (2026) — [47billion.com/blog/ai-agents-in-production-frameworks-protocols-and-what-actually-works-in-2026/](https://47billion.com/blog/ai-agents-in-production-frameworks-protocols-and-what-actually-works-in-2026/)
- **Lessons from 2025 on Agents and Trust** — Google Cloud CTO Office (Dec 2025) — [cloud.google.com/transform/ai-grew-up-and-got-a-job-lessons-from-2025-on-agents-and-trust](https://cloud.google.com/transform/ai-grew-up-and-got-a-job-lessons-from-2025-on-agents-and-trust)
- **A Hitchhiker's Guide to Building AI Agents** — Saurabh Alone (2025) — [saurabhalone.com/blog/agent](https://saurabhalone.com/blog/agent)
- **Making Sense of Memory in AI Agents** — Leonie Monigatti (2025) — [leoniemonigatti.com/blog/memory-in-ai-agents.html](https://www.leoniemonigatti.com/blog/memory-in-ai-agents.html)
- **Strix: Meet the Stateful Agent** — Tim Kellogg (Dec 2025) — [timkellogg.me/blog/2025/12/15/strix](https://timkellogg.me/blog/2025/12/15/strix)
- **Memory Architecture for a Synthetic Being** — Tim Kellogg (Dec 2025) — [timkellogg.me/blog/2025/12/30/memory-arch](https://timkellogg.me/blog/2025/12/30/memory-arch)
- **Viable Systems: How to Build a Fully Autonomous Agent** — Tim Kellogg (Jan 2026) — [timkellogg.me/blog/2026/01/09/viable-systems](https://timkellogg.me/blog/2026/01/09/viable-systems)
- **One Human + One Agent + One Browser** — emsh.cat (2026) — [emsh.cat/one-human-one-agent-one-browser/](https://emsh.cat/one-human-one-agent-one-browser/)
- **OpenAI Harness Engineering** — OpenAI (2025) — [openai.com/index/harness-engineering/](https://openai.com/index/harness-engineering/)

### Courses & Educational Resources
- **DeepLearning.AI — AI Agents in LangGraph** — [deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agents-in-langgraph/](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agents-in-langgraph/)
- **DeepLearning.AI — Multi AI Agent Systems with crewAI** — [deeplearning.ai/short-courses/multi-ai-agent-systems-with-crewai/](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/multi-ai-agent-systems-with-crewai/)
- **DeepLearning.AI — AI Agentic Design Patterns with AutoGen** — [deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agentic-design-patterns-with-autogen/](https://www.deeplearning.ai/short-courses/ai-agentic-design-patterns-with-autogen/)
- **Hugging Face — Agents Course** — [huggingface.co/learn/agents-course](https://huggingface.co/learn/agents-course)

### Benchmarks & Evaluation
- **SWE-bench** — [swebench.com](https://www.swebench.com)
- **WebArena** — [arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.13854)
- **AgentBench** — [arxiv.org/abs/2308.03688](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.03688)
- **GAIA** — [arxiv.org/abs/2311.12983](https://arxiv.org/abs/2311.12983)
- **OSWorld** — [arxiv.org/abs/2404.07972](https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.07972)

---

## About This Survey

This survey was compiled in **March 2026** by [John P. Lake](https://github.com/johnplake). It covers the LLM agent literature from 2022 through early 2026.

[View source on GitHub](https://github.com/johnplake/llm-agents-survey) · [Report an issue](https://github.com/johnplake/llm-agents-survey/issues)
